title: Intermolecular forces, electronegativity and bond properties
summary: 9701 AS — van der Waals, dipole–dipole, hydrogen bonding, and property trends.
learningObjectives: Explain boiling point trends using IMF.
Compare IMF strength in similar molecules.

simpleExplanation.title: Forces between molecules
simpleExplanation.summary: Covalent bonds are strong within molecules; weaker intermolecular forces act between molecules and affect physical properties.
steps: H-bond: H with N, O, F.

sections.content: **Intermolecular forces** (3.6) explains **anomalies like H₂O vs H₂S**. Use the **Molecule Polarity** sim to visualise dipoles.
